programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Speed Zone
programme.desc: Despite the polices preemptive strike the illegal coast-to-coast car race is still on with new drivers Its a race where fair play red lights stop signs police roadblocks and traffic rules in general have no validity

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War -The Somme
programme.desc: The 1916 Somme offensive was one of the largest and bloodiest battles of the First World War 1914-18 The opening day of the attack 1 July 1916 saw the British Army sustain 57000 casualties the bloodiest day in its history

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War - Gallipoli
programme.desc: On 29 October 1914 two former German warships the Ottoman conducted the Black Sea raid in which they bombarded the Russian port of Odessa and sank several shipsthe Ottomans entered the war and began the Caucasus campaign against Russia The British briefly bombarded forts in Gallipoli invaded Mesopotamia and studied the possibility of forcing the Dardanelles

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Sun Hill is forced to accept the legacy of DS Beech and Meadows discovers that he is not the only one with a questionable past

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Greg will lie about anything to get a date with a hot girl but when she ends up being everything he has already lied about he must die Then her roommate wants to get ahead at work so is introduced her to a beauty czar who makes her exquisitely lovely which spells her downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Indebted unhappy married couple Lou and Irene commit a life insurance fraud Lous brother Billy helps him fake his death and leave for Mexico But Irene and Billy fall in love and when Lou returns they claim they dont know him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lew Bridgeman and Joe Caldwell are two longtime best friends who served together in the Vietnam War Lew and Joe wind clashing with each other over Lews fetching wife Rae whom both men are in love with

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A college student dreams of becoming a werewolf and discovers an antique camera that will turn him into his favorite movie monster

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are upset when Luke sells food on credit to a failing restaurant run by a widow and her daughter but the McCoy patriarch softens his no credit stance considerably when he learns that the proprietress is attractive and spunky

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are initially honored by a visit from supposedly pro-farmer Congressional candidate Jim Slade but they decide to turn the tables when they learn that he has never been a farmer and is interested mainly in self-aggrandizement

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After every number two man at CONTROL is killed Hymie becomes number two

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS puts up a reward for anyone who can Get Smart!

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear help lady trucker Snow White and her friends fend off attacks by the Hi-Ballers a gang of truckers who dont cotton to competition from women in Winslow County turf they control with corrupt cops Wiley and the Fox

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: A going-on-15-year-old boy-crazy girl has moved into the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans 327
programme.desc: Hogans 327

programme.title: Hogans 316
programme.desc: Hogans 316

programme.title: Mchale 321
programme.desc: Mchale 321

programme.title: Mchales Navy
programme.desc: Ensign Charles Parker - Newly assigned to the 73 Crew as Executive Officer - Is Binghamtons last hope to tame McHale and his pirates Though Parker is unwelcome at first McHale sees potential in the young Officer and orders his Crew to shape up so that Parker wont be shipped out

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A Colonel and his young daughter are visiting Camp Henderson While befriending the little girl Pyle has no problem getting her and himself in trouble with everyone

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter is chosen to appear in a documentary but becomes an absurd camera hog leaving producers no choice but to follow Gomer performing punishments Carter doles out

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Vega

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Maurice a famous French chef and chemist has created something world-changing and wants to distribute it through Jonathans company but before he can tell Jonathan about it he is killed and his recipes stolen

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Leslies cousin is about to be wed and has set her lustful sights on next-door Kirk for some passion in her life

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: An aging unfunny comic who is an old friend of Dicks uses the Stratford to jump start his career despite Joannas objections

programme.title: Major 126
programme.desc: Major 126

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Johnny Larkin a brutal convict escapes from prison and vows to kill everyone associated with his arrest and conviction including Garner

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are arrested when they mistakenly pick up a crate containing a marijuana shipment Private detective Mason Dixon and his two beautiful female associates are convinced the Duke boys are innocent and they work together to bring down a drug-smuggling operation

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Padar is a fierce battle game where spectators can connect via a jack patch that Liam suspects is causing neurological damage to users When a Padar warrior dies it raises even more questions about the safety

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A vengeful voodoo priestess ensnares Arcane in a voodoo curse as revenge for his enslavement of Jim Kipp who had once saved a cousin of hers from drowning Alec helps Graham and a kindly voodoo priest save Arcane from certain dea

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed psychic comes to the swamp in search of Alec Holland with a message from his dead wife Linda She also reveals that Jim is still alive and will be heard from soon

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A sinister woman called Zamara materializes on the base forcing Helena and Tony to accompany her to the planet of Vega whose natives are anything but friendly A servant of the Vegans known only as Number Eight informs the two Alphans that he and his race are the natural inhabitants of the planet and that Zamara and her race are androids who it turns out want the Alphans to teach them warfare

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A schizophrenic nightclub entertainer dresses up as a famous torch singer

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IM force is tasked to prevent a rigged election in a small Latin American nation from happening and enabling the results to be genuine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A computer scientist appalled to discover that his chauffeur was actually Dr Kimble uses his new state-of-the-art computer to assist Gerard and predict Kimbles movements from city to city

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is drawn to an alluring old girlfriend who is now married and part of a trick shooting act When her husband is mysteriously killed in a gun accident Heath is accused of murder Jarrod must use a new science to try to clear him but ends up sparring about it with the DAan old law school colleague who is jealous of the Barkleys

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.desc: It is Striker vs. Grappler! At Hard Knocks 50, John Woo and Jordan Van Heek fight an impressive short round. This episode of Out of the Cage focuses on John Woo and his path to his amateur debut fight.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the best TKO's from SPRING 2014. George De La Rosa vs. Mike Scamurra; Anton Tokarchuk vs. Jesse Day Rider; Justin Schmit vs. Devon Smith; Cory Knipe vs. Anton Tokarchuk.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.desc: Meet the man in 1992 who helped to end the Rodney King riots

programme.title: The K Victoria Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gar lies to his son and daughter Octo and Seena saying Audric stole the root that he developed and that Jayce has taken credit for everything Gar is taken by Saw Boss and instructs Octo to get help from the Lightning League

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss enlists the aid of the Life Eater to be rid of Jayce but the job must be done by the Life Eaters conditions he causes his subjects to face their worst fears and if they weaken even for a moment their life force is trapped forever

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Dr Choi is kidnapped by a giant mechanical scorpion VENOM forces him to help them locate the lost treasure of Kubla Khan hidden inside the Great Wall of China

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents try to convince Gadget that he can replace the King of Pianostan

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Trindles recover their Tramulet with the Guardians help and turn Cy-Kills plans against him

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades hold a towns children hostage to force the adults to build a giant Ultra Zod which will conquer Earth and then GoBotron
